summary: Tested landing page responsiveness across mobile (375px, 414px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1440px, 1920px) viewports. All responsive styling changes working correctly: hamburger menu, text scaling, button sizing, pricing grid layout, mobile menu navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor horizontal scroll on mobile/tablet viewports (14-16px overflow) caused by fixed-width gradient circles (600px, 500px, 450px) in hero section. Hero section has overflow:hidden but absolute positioned gradient blobs still cause minor scroll.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Either add overflow-x:hidden to body/html, or use max-width:100vw on gradient circles, or reduce sizes on mobile

features_tested: Landing page loads correctly at all viewports
Navbar shows hamburger on mobile, nav links on desktop (md+)
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes when clicked
Mobile menu links scroll to sections and close menu
Hero buttons NOT full width on any viewport
Agent spotlight features grid: 1-col on small, 2-col on sm+
Pricing cards: 1-col on mobile, 3-col on md+
Footer renders correctly at all sizes
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix minor horizontal scroll on mobile by adding overflow-x:hidden to body or reducing MeshBackground gradient circle sizes on mobile viewports

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all major features working, minor cosmetic overflow issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page responsive styling tested thoroughly. Minor horizontal scroll issue (14-16px) on mobile/tablet caused by MeshBackground gradient circles with fixed widths. This is cosmetic only - no content overflow. All responsive breakpoints working correctly: hamburger menu, text scaling, grid layouts.
